memoryArtifacts.description:
Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Baynham, Bayneham, Bainham, Banham, Banam and others. First found in the county of Norfolk, where they held a family seat from ancient times, long before the Norman Conquest in 1066.
Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: William Baynham who settled in New England in 1718; Richard Baynham settled in Maryland in 1774; Henry Baynham also settled in New England in 1763. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). This unusual and interesting name is of early medieval Welsh origin, and is a relatively modern form of the Old Welsh patronymic "ap Einion" or "ap Eynon". The personal name derives from the Welsh "einion", anvil, an implement representing stability and fortitude. One Einion yrth was noted in ancient documents of Wales, dated 420 C.E, and an Ennian filius (son of ) Gieruerth appears in the 1159 Pipe Rolls of Shropshire. Early examples of the patronymic include: Cadugan ap Eynon (Radnorshire, 1285); Iorworth ap Egnon (Cheshire, 1287); and Griffith ap Beynam (Carmarthenshire, 1539). In the modern idiom the surname has many variant forms, ranging from Beynon, Benian, Bennion, Benyon and Baynham to Pin(n)ion, Pinyon and Pinyoun. The form Baynham is most widespread in Gloucestershire. In 1501, Alex Baynham was High Sheriff of Gloucestershire, and in 1623, the son of Robert ap Eignon, of Chorewell, in the forest of Dean, spelled his surname Baynham, the name by which the family is now known. James and Sarah Bennion were recorded variously in Shropshire Registers as Bynam and Baynom in 1670, and in 1698 they are Baynham. A Coat of Arms granted to the Baynham families of Kent and Gloucestershire is a red shield with a chevron between three silver bulls' heads cabossed, armed gold, the Crest being a gold bull's head couped at the neck. The first recorded spelling of the family name is shown to be that of John Baynham, which was dated 1455, in "A Descriptive Catalogue of Ancient Deeds", Worcestershire, during the reign of King Henry 6th, known as "The Founder of Eton", 1422 - 1461. Surnames became necessary when governments introduced personal taxation. In England this was known as Poll Tax. Throughout the centuries, surnames in every country have continued to "develop" often leading to astonishing variants of the original spelling.  Copyright: Name Origin Research www.surnamedb.com 1980 - 2014.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Baynham於1422年4月9日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Robert ap Eynon Baynham22歲，母親Margeret Abrahall20歲。他於大約1465年與Agnes Walwyn結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年2月16日在英國享年77歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩。

nameMeanings.name: Baynham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English (West Midlands): variant of Welsh   Bennion  .

variants.name: Bennion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’ (see Eynon ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Baynham was born on 9 April 1422, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Robert ap Eynon Baynham, was 22 and his mother, Margeret Abrahall, was 20. He married Agnes Walwyn about 1465. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 10 daughters. He died on 16 February 1500, in England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Baynham est né le 9 avril 1422, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert ap Eynon Baynham, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margeret Abrahall, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Walwyn environ 1465. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé le 16 février 1500, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Baynham am 9. April 1422 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert ap Eynon Baynham 22 und seine Mutter Margeret Abrahall 20. Er hat um 1465 Agnes Walwyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 10 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Februar 1500 im Alter von 77 Jahren in England und wurde in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes Walwyn circa 1465. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 10 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1500, nel England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Baynhamが1422年4月9日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert ap Eynon Baynhamは22歳，母Margeret Abrahallは20歳であった。約1465年にAgnes Walwynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1500年2月16日にイギリスで77歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアミッチェルディーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Baynham(이)가 1422년 4월 9일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert ap Eynon Baynham(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margeret Abrahall(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1465년 Agnes Walwyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 2월 16일 영국에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 미트헬디에 묻혔다.

pt.9 April 1422–16 February 1500: 9 de abril de 1422–16 de fevereiro de 1500
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Baynham nasceu em 9 de abril de 1422, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert ap Eynon Baynham, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margeret Abrahall, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Walwyn aproximadamente 1465. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1500, em Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Baynham родился 9 апреля 1422 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert ap Eynon Baynham было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margeret Abrahall, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Walwyn около 1465 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 10 дочерей. Он умер 16 февраля 1500 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.9 April 1422–16 February 1500: 9 de abril de 1422–16 de febrero de 1500
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Baynham nació el 9 de abril de 1422, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert ap Eynon Baynham, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margeret Abrahall, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes Walwyn aproximadamente 1465. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 10 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1500, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
